Interface IStandaloneTableInfo

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.Carto
Assembly
ESRI.Server.Carto.dll

Provides access to StandaloneTableInfo.

[Guid("1095230C-75D1-459C-BD67-5C2C3F3B01B7")]
[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
public interface IStandaloneTableInfo : IMapTableInfo

Properties

Description

The description of the Stand Alone table. This property is set in the General tab of the Properties dialog.

string Description { get; }

Property Value

string
